ddls:
CREATE TABLE "politicians" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each politician */,
  "politician_name" TEXT /* Common name of the politician */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full legal name of the politician */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the politician */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the politician */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the politician */,
  "century_of_office" TEXT /* Century during which the politician held office */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the politician */,
  "portrait_url" TEXT /* URL of the politician's portrait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the political party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the political party was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_parties" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "affiliation_start_date" TEXT /* Date the politician started affiliation with the party */,
  "affiliation_end_date" TEXT /* Date the politician ended affiliation with the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id", "party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the political position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_positions" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position held */,
  "year_started" INTEGER /* Year the politician started the position */,
  "year_ended" INTEGER /* Year the politician ended the position */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the politician was elected to the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birthplace */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the birthplace */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the birthplace */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the birthplace */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the birthplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational entry */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Educational institution attended */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "year_attended" INTEGER /* Year the politician attended the institution */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "year_achieved" INTEGER /* Year the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., election, appointment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_milestones_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy initiative */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy initiative */,
  "year_initiated" INTEGER /* Year the initiative was started */,
  "initiative_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_initiatives_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, journalist, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician mentioned in the article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician mentioned in the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the social media post was published */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)
